summary: The most advantageous indication of acid etching is enhancing chemically bonded strength between resin-based materials and tooth structure, which improves resistance against root fractures rather than directly reducing micro-leakage. This bond formation provides superior long-term durability for restored teeth compared to non-etched surfaces due to increased mechanical stability at critical interfaces.
